title: Add the Activity Tracker to Dashboards - particularly last viewed
excerpt: When using a dashboard, we should be able to see which members have viewed or engaged with the information presented.

posts.author: Karlinguernsey (Karl Wilkins)
posts.cookedHtml: When using a dashboard, we should be able to see which members have viewed or engaged with the information presented.

posts.author: jenholmes (Jennifer Holmes)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes! This would be so helpful. We make a lot of dashboards, some of them with multiple owners. It would be really helpful not only to see who made changes, but also to see how frequently the dashboards are being viewed as another indicator of how useful they are.
